title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dell India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
